acceptedIds: Wisconsin driver's license or state ID card
Military ID with photo and signature
Tribal ID with photo and signature
Student ID from Wisconsin accredited school (with proof of enrollment)
exceptions: Without acceptable photo ID, voter casts a provisional ballot and has until 4 PM the Friday after election to provide ID.
provisionalBallotRules: Present acceptable photo ID by 4 PM Friday following election.
phonesAtPollsDetail: No photography of ballot or inside voting booth.
